raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad fuhttja tas Keh- 
niſch/ ka wiſſi Wezza- 
jee no Juhda un Jeru- 
salemes pee winna fanahktu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tasKehniſch gabje ang- 
ſchaim eekſch ta KUNGA Nam- 
ma/ un ar winnu wiſſi Wihri 
no Juhda/ un wiſſi Jerusalemes 
Gedsihwotaji/ un wiſſi Preestexi 
un Praweeschi/un wiſſi Laudis/ 
tik labbi maſi ka leeli. Un wiſſch 
laſſija wiſſus Wahrdus tahs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Derribas Grahmataſ preeſch 
winnu Auſtin/ kaſta KUNGA 
Namina tappe atrasta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehniſch ſtahwe- 
ja pee ta Pihlara/ un darrija 
weenu Derribu preeſch ta KUN- 
GA Waiga/ ka bij tam KUN- 
GAm pakkat staigabt/ un tur- 
reht winna Bauſius/ un winna 
Leezibas/ un winna Eiſkumus 
no wiſſas Sirds/ un no wiſſas 
Dwehfeles/ ka tee fchahs Derri- 
bas Wahrdus ſtipri turretu/kaſ 
fchaï Grahmata rakſtiti bija/un 
wiſſi Laudis uſnehte ſcho Der- 
ribu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehniſch paweh- 
leja tam Augſtam Preesteram 
Iſkijum/ir teem Preestereem tahs 
ohtras Kahrtas/ un teem Sleeg- 
na Sargeem/ ka tee no ta KUN- 
GA Namma iſnestu wiſſus 
Rihkus/ kaſ preeſch Baäla/ un 
preeſch ta Elka Mescha / un 
preeſch wiſſa Debbes Spehka 
Darriti bija/ un wiſſch fadeds- 
naja tahs ahra preeſch Jerusale- 
mes Kihdrana Eeletjas/ un lik-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ke winnu Pihſchtus us Be- 
li nest.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſſch nozeble arrid- 
tohs * Kamariim/ ko tee Kehn 
no Juhda bii eezehtſchi/ ka 
Juhda Piſſhaftos un apka 
Jerusaſemi us teem Augſtume 
kwehpinaht/ ir tohs/ kaſ B 
lani/ tat Saulei/ un tam M 
neſim/ un Swaigsnehm/ un w 
fam Debbes Spehkain kweh 
naja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "* Kamariim bija tahdi Laudis, kas no 
wekeem bes Deewa Pawehlefchanas eezehti 
ja, un tappe par Swehteem turreti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſſch iſneffe arridsan 
Elka Mescha Bildi no ta KU 
GA Namuna ahrä preeſch 
rusalemes/ kihdrana Uppê/ 
tadedſinaja to pee Kihdrana u 
pes/ un jagruhde to par Pih- 
leem/ un mette winnas Pih- 
lus us to (elka deewigu) La 
schu Kappeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſſch nolaufija arrids 
to Manzineeku Nammus/kas 
ta KUNGA Namma bija/ 
tahs Seewas Nammius 
de preeſch ta Elka Mescha Bi-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſſch fauedde wiſſ 
Preesterus no Juhda Piſſa- 
teem/ un jagahnija tahs Augſ- 
mus/ kur tee Swehtitaji 
kwehpinaſcht/ no Gebas li 
Bersebai/ un wiſſch nolaufi 
tohs Augſtums eekſch Wa- 
tim/ kaſ eekſch Josuus ta Pi- 
fatta Wirfueeka Wahrtim bi- 
tain pa kreifo Rohku/ kad za 
Wahrtim Piſſahta ee-eet.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
